name: justextract
description: Just Extract (Just-E) - Audio extraction and video editing web application

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npx tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.test: cd frontend && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
